persistence.model_basis: Single PostgreSQL store; each entity has exactly one owning domain component as sole writer/producer; C1 provides storage for all persisted entities but owns none; field-level schemas deferred per cut (E2/E5/E6/E7 to S4, E3 to S2, E4 derived/layout to S3, E1 to S1)

entities.name: Freelancer
entities.logical_description: Primary user account; stores provider token and user profile reference from OAuth delegation; scopes all domain data; no stored credentials.
entities.owner_basis: Identity & Auth governs freelancer account creation and authentication; C2 is sole writer of E1 via CT1 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: One freelancer owns many client projects; ADR-0003 entity chain E1→E2 FK; INV2 (single freelancer per account)

entities.field_schema_note: Skeleton seam FD3 — freelancer identity (provider token, user profile reference) schema committed at S1; field layout belongs to skeleton delivery.

entities.name: Client Project
entities.logical_description: Named project owned by a freelancer on behalf of a client; carries a single currency designation and a single billable rate; all time entries and invoices for this project inherit these values.
entities.owner_basis: Project Management creates, reads, updates, and deletes client project records; C3 is sole writer of E2 via CT2 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: Many projects belong to one freelancer; ADR-0003 E1→E2 FK chain; INV2
One project contains many time entries; ADR-0003 E2→E3 FK chain; R7
Many projects may share a currency designation; each project carries exactly one currency; INV3
Many projects may be associated with one client; E2 references the client record to whom the invoice is addressed; R6
Each project has exactly one billable rate attached; ADR-0003 entity chain; INV4

entities.field_schema_note: Client Project field layout (name, client reference, currency designation, billable rate) deferred to S4 per cut deferred[]; no project data created before S4.

entities.name: Time Entry
entities.logical_description: Single logged unit of billable work (date, description, hours) tied to a project; inherits the project's currency and rate; no per-entry rate or currency field.
entities.owner_basis: Time Logging accepts, persists, and displays time entries; C4 is sole writer of E3 via CT4 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: Many time entries belong to one project; ADR-0003 E2→E3 FK chain; R7; entry inherits project-level currency and rate per INV3, INV4

entities.field_schema_note: Time-entry field layout (date, description, hours, project association, freelancer association) deferred to S2 per cut deferred[]; no time entries created before S2.

entities.name: Invoice
entities.logical_description: Monthly PDF document aggregating billable hours for a client project; generated server-side on demand and streamed to the browser as a file download; not stored — derived on demand from E2 and E3.
entities.owner_basis: Invoice Export is sole producer of E4; generates and streams the PDF artifact on demand; no store-write seam for E4 — correct for a derived entity.

relationships.basis: An invoice is generated for exactly one project (and one calendar month); E4 reads project header data (currency, rate, client) from E2; INV5
An invoice aggregates many time entries for the selected month; E3 records are source inputs for invoice line items; R8, INV5

entities.field_schema_note: Invoice PDF template layout and line-item aggregation logic deferred to S3 per cut deferred[]; E4 is derived (no stored schema); layout belongs to S3 producing slice.

entities.name: Currency
entities.logical_description: Currency designation (e.g. USD, EUR) applied at the project level; all time entries and invoices for a project use the same currency; no per-entry or per-invoice currency variation.
entities.owner_basis: Project Management owns currency designation as part of project-level monetary configuration; C3 is sole writer of E5 via CT2 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: One currency designation may be used by many projects; each project carries exactly one currency; INV3; R4

entities.field_schema_note: Currency designation storage model deferred to S4 per cut deferred[] (multi-currency project selection UI and schema belong to S4).

entities.name: Client
entities.logical_description: Data record representing the party that owns a project and to whom an invoice is addressed; stores name, contact details, and billing address; no client login or portal.
entities.owner_basis: Project Management creates and manages client records as part of project management flow; C3 is sole writer of E6 via CT2 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: One client may be associated with many projects; E2 references its client record; R6; INV8

entities.field_schema_note: Client record data shape (name, contact details, billing address) deferred to S4 per cut deferred[]; no client data created before S4.

entities.name: Billable Rate
entities.logical_description: Monetary hourly rate attached to a client project; all time entries in the project inherit this rate for invoice line-item computation; no per-entry rate variation.
entities.owner_basis: Project Management owns project-level billable rate configuration; C3 is sole writer of E7 via CT2 (shared_data write to C1).

relationships.basis: Each billable rate is attached to exactly one project; ADR-0003 entity chain; INV4

entities.field_schema_note: Billable rate field layout deferred to S4 per cut deferred[] (included in Client Project entity schema deferred item).
